# Repositories — Patterns & Reference

All repositories live in `Repositories/`. The EF Core context is `ApiShopContext`.

## Existing Repositories
| Interface | Implementation | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `IUserRepository` | `UserRepository` | User CRUD + login lookup |
| `IProductsRepository` | `ProductsRepository` | Products with filtering & pagination |
| `ICategoriesRepository` | `CategoriesRepository` | Category CRUD |
| `IOrdersRepository` | `OrdersRepository` | Order creation & retrieval |
| `IRatingRepository` | `RatingRepository` | Insert tracking record per request |

> **Note:** Some filenames begin with an invisible RTL Unicode character. Use `Get-ChildItem` in PowerShell to confirm exact names before reading or editing.

---

## ApiShopContext
- Auto-generated by **EF Core Power Tools** — do **not** edit `ApiShopContext.cs` directly.
- Extend model config using a separate `partial class ApiShopContext` file.
- DbSets: `Categories`, `Orders`, `OrderItems`, `Products`, `Ratings`, `Users`.

---

## Repository Interface Template

```csharp
namespace Repositories
{
    public interface IXxxRepository
    {
        Task<IEnumerable<Xxx>> GetAll();
        Task<Xxx?> GetById(int id);
        Task<Xxx> Create(Xxx entity);
        Task Update(Xxx entity);
        Task Delete(int id);
    }
}
```

## Repository Implementation Template

```csharp
using Entities;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;

namespace Repositories
{
    public class XxxRepository : IXxxRepository
    {
        private readonly ApiShopContext _context;

        public XxxRepository(ApiShopContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<IEnumerable<Xxx>> GetAll()
            => await _context.Xxxs.ToListAsync();

        public async Task<Xxx?> GetById(int id)
            => await _context.Xxxs.FindAsync(id);

        public async Task<Xxx> Create(Xxx entity)
        {
            _context.Xxxs.Add(entity);
            await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
            return entity;
        }

        public async Task Update(Xxx entity)
        {
            _context.Xxxs.Update(entity);
            await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
        }

        public async Task Delete(int id)
        {
            var entity = await _context.Xxxs.FindAsync(id);
            if (entity != null)
            {
                _context.Xxxs.Remove(entity);
                await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## Service Layer Pattern

Services sit between the controller and the repository and handle business logic, AutoMapper mapping, and any Redis caching.

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using DTOs;
using Entities;

namespace Services
{
    public class XxxServices : IXxxServices
    {
        private readonly IXxxRepository _repo;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public XxxServices(IXxxRepository repo, IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repo = repo;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<IEnumerable<XxxDTO>> GetAll()
        {
            var entities = await _repo.GetAll();
            return _mapper.Map<IEnumerable<XxxDTO>>(entities);
        }
    }
}
```

## Unit Test Template (Moq)

```csharp
using Moq;
using Moq.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Entities;
using Repositories;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;

namespace TestProject
{
    public class XxxRepositoryUnitTests
    {
        [Fact]
        public async Task GetAll_ShouldReturnAllItems()
        {
            var options = new DbContextOptions<ApiShopContext>();
            var mockContext = new Mock<ApiShopContext>(options);

            var data = new List<Xxx>
            {
                new Xxx { XxxId = 1, Name = "Test" }
            };
            mockContext.Setup(x => x.Xxxs).ReturnsDbSet(data);

            var repo = new XxxRepository(mockContext.Object);
            var result = await repo.GetAll();

            Assert.Single(result);
        }
    }
}
```

## Rules
- Always inject `ApiShopContext` — never instantiate it directly.
- Use `async/await` + EF Core async methods (`ToListAsync`, `FindAsync`, `SaveChangesAsync`).
- Register every interface/implementation pair in `Program.cs` with `AddScoped`.
- Entities are `partial class` types in `Entities/` — **never** modify auto-generated files; instead create a separate partial class file.
- For filtering queries, build an `IQueryable<T>` and call `ToListAsync()` once at the end.
- **Never use PowerShell inline scripts to edit RTL-prefixed files** — use file-editing tools directly. Always read a file before adding methods to avoid duplication.
